reviews.review_title: Great VR cardio! Huge respect to the dev
reviews.review_description:
Great VR cardio! Huge respect to the developer!

ArmStrong VR is a real gem for anyone looking for active workouts in virtual reality. The game 100% delivers on making you sweat and get moving!
What’s especially impressive and deserves a lot of respect is the fact that this is a solo developer project (MarshoBros). You can really tell they pour their heart and soul into the game, consistently working hard, and most importantly, listening to the community. It’s awesome that the creator noticed how many of us use the game for fitness and is now dropping Update 1.1 with a full-fledged tracking system. The interactive stand and the real-time calorie counter based on swing speed are exactly what was needed for the perfect cardio session!
I highly recommend this to anyone who wants to combine gaming with a good workout. Huge thanks to the developer for all the hard work—keep it up, we can't wait for future updates!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the incredibly kind words! Reading reviews like this makes all the long hours of solo development completely worth it.

I'm really glad to hear that the newly released Update 1.1 hits the mark for you! Building this game based on the community's feedback has been the best part of the process. Knowing that the new fitness tracking and calorie counter are exactly what you guys needed gives me a huge boost of motivation to keep going.

Thank you for sweating it out in ArmStrong VR and for your amazing support. I'll keep working hard to make the game even better for your daily cardio! 🏃‍♂️💪
